title: Series and parallel resistors
description: Identify series and parallel resistors in a circuit setting

assessment_items.question_content:
Identify the resistors in SERIES.  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4142df1784032352d8b1d302634e7c27.svg)
[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Resistors connected directly end to end, with no extra branches in between, are said to be in series.
R3 is in series with R4.

assessment_items.question_content:
Identify the resistors in SERIES.  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d7ad27a3eb453aba872a9dfff196c5b9.svg)
[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Resistors connected directly end to end, with no extra branches in between, are said to be in series.
R3 is in series with R4.

assessment_items.question_content:
Identify the resistors in SERIES.  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/301f9b99e2174cbb9b1da346df3065fd.svg)
[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Resistors connected directly end to end, with no extra branches in between, are said to be in series.
There are no resistors in series.

assessment_items.question_content:
Identify the resistors in SERIES.  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/95311debbee7f20e8fa7cff6386ffe29.svg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Resistors connected directly end to end, with no extra branches in between, are said to be in series.

- R1 is in series with R5
- R3 is in series with R4.

assessment_items.question_content:
Identify the resistors in PARALLEL.  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4142df1784032352d8b1d302634e7c27.svg)
[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Parallel resistors have both ends connected to the same two nodes.
R1 is in parallel with R2.

assessment_items.question_content:
Identify the resistors in PARALLEL.  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d7ad27a3eb453aba872a9dfff196c5b9.svg)
[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The terminals of parallel resistors are connected to the same two nodes.
R1 is in parallel with R2.

assessment_items.question_content:
Identify the resistors in PARALLEL.  
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/301f9b99e2174cbb9b1da346df3065fd.svg)
[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Parallel resistors have their terminals connected to the same two nodes.
R2 is in parallel with R3.

assessment_items.question_content:
Identify the resistors in PARALLEL.  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/95311debbee7f20e8fa7cff6386ffe29.svg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The terminals of parallel resistors are connected to the same two nodes.
